adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: minimax-1

model.title: Model
model.description: The MiniMax model name. Example: MiniMax-M3

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Pre-filled with the default; change only if MiniMax moves the base URL or you use a regional endpoint.

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies. Leave it empty to use the provider default.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

enable_reasoning.title: Enable Reasoning
enable_reasoning.description: Toggle on for reasoning models to route reasoning_effort via the OpenAI-compatible request body.

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Sets the reasoning strength when Enable Reasoning is on.
